name: Bolster
tooltip: > <C>40 /s</> defense regeneration, can gain defense buffer
<B>> <C>50%</> reduced speed and vitals restored from all sources</>

name: Bleed
enh_tooltip: <B>> Absorbs one bleed clear, downgrades to bleed</>

name: Burn
tooltip: <B>> Burn ticks don't deplete while moving over 8m/s</>

name: Corrode
tooltip: <B>> <C>100%</> reduced vitals restored from all sources</>
enh_tooltip: <B>> <C>50%</> of attempted vitals restoration received as vital damage</>

name: Desync
tooltip: <B>> Scrambles radar, detections and targeting systems</>
enh_tooltip: <B>> <C>50</> shock damage and 2s Disable+ on active Core and relocation</>
<B>> Core activation no longer clears Desync</>

name: Disable
tooltip: <B>> Disables: set augments/devices/projectiles, detections, paints, radar, defense and ammo regeneration, device activation</>
<B>> Pauses active device/stim cooldowns and objectives for duration</>

name: Drop Shield
tooltip: > 50 - 0% reduced gravity proportional to look direction from horizontal to down
<B>> 200% increased tick rate while climbing, grounded or suspended</>

name: Hyper
tooltip: > Full AUX and Aerial charges refill

name: Overcharge
tooltip: > <C>15%</> increased ground speed, climb speed and dexterity
> Disable enemy players, devices and projectiles within <C>3 m</> for <C>2 s</>

name: Overkill
tooltip: > Melee attacks and body impacts bypass defense
> <C>100%</> reduced speed penalties and aux drain from all sources

name: Shroud
tooltip: > Immunity to: radar, detections, targeting optics, locks

name: Snare
enh_tooltip: <B>> Removes all aerial charges, maneuvers and the ability to climb</>
